subcodes.first_line: O Thou Candle of the Love of God! I beseech God that thou mayest shine forth in every gathering and radiate the light of thy Lord in every assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله از خدا میطلبم که در هر جمعی روشن گردی و در هر انجمنی نور رب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
